AC: 19
HP Regen +5
WT: 6.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: CHEST
AC: 19
HP Regen +5
WT: 6.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL

Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Trakanon's Teeth
NPC Name
Crusader Zoglic


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Trakanon's Teeth


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

« Previous 1 2 3 4 Next »
Post Comment
Drop rate
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2006 at 2:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592261204723
Scholar
22 posts
I Don't know about very rare, was getting seb key for my boxed cleric tonight, and saw this dude wander by. Killed him, and looted BP. Two minutes later, I saw him again, killed him and got another BP. Didn't see him again, but probly a good thing cause I only had two chars on and its lore... so the rarity rating of very rare must mean because of the spawn cycle of Crusader Zoglic.

# Oct 05 2005 at 12:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592765657587
20 posts
rofl look at the price for maelin... god damn our server is overpriced. i see savants caps for 1k, fs for 50plat, lol ikky bp for 15k?? damn i wish i got 15K for mine when i sold it... but damn do i miss it. time to go solo this mob.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 07 2004 at 7:48 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ok at lvl 64 this item is a complete piece of ****. you should have something better. u should at least have a donals bp
Icky BP
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2004 at 10:38 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966665496
3 posts
This effect is now Regen +5. Great twink Item prices have been going up significantly on Ayonne Roe. Got two of these for alts 9 mos ago for 4.5k but now they sell for 11-19k. With advent of more regen items from LDON you can seriously twink a melee with regen items. Hve lvl 31 Troll Warrior with 17 pts of regen per tick, thats 170hp min. Down time is minimal between solo battles.

Bawgg Toadstomper, Troll of Doom
▲ Page top
Forager Cycle
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2004 at 8:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592257512653
4 posts
Ok ive had it ive been camping this guy for 5 days now. Im lvl 65 druid have had a lvl 65 ranger and bard helping track at times. the only time ive left TT was to get refresh on c3. Ive had ppl zone in and take the named when they do spawn on me. after telling them that i was doin the named cycle. But still have not seen hide nor hair of Zoglic. So im pretty disgusted at the moment. Which put the topping on the cake i was pulling forager and hunters to TT zone for a bunch of ppl looking for there Selbs keys. A named spawned and before i could get to it these ppl i was helping get there keys . Pulled the named mob killed it and then wouldnt even let me loot what it dropped. So again im pretty bummed out right now. I dont think im ever goin to see Zoglic. Well i guess it doesnt matter just wanted the BP for my alt. Good goin you guys there where in TT tonight. Havent run into ppl like that in awhile Made me wake up to the way some ppl are that play this game
▲ Page top
RE: Forager Cycle
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2004 at 8:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594573640660
175 posts
Yeah there are a lot of conceited jerks in the game. They love it when you help them,but they don't lift a finger to help you in return. But then,if all the generous,helpful players quit the game all that will be left are the jerks.....
At least I keep helping whenever I can. I respect everyone until they say/do something to ruin that respect. Then they can kiss my left butt-cheek good-bye :-)
On this item,it's wonderful but way too expensive in Bazaar. Obviously,a lot of people buy PP on web-sites so they can buy these items in Bazaar.
Just like another game I used to play......

Sorry about the doubled post....got error message so I Refreshed and hit Send Message a second time

Dropped
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2004 at 2:45 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760803480
View User Forum
277 posts
Last night on a friends 58 druid, i decided to camp the forager/hunter cycle to get the BP. I was just killing the forager, as they spawn instantly, and a number of named poped... After about 2 hours some people came who wanted the Key so i said they could take any they saw, but no named. I then killed the Forager, a named poped, with hunter up. I went to named, when he was on about 30%, i checked track and Crusader was up. I dont know if he was just on the hunter cycle, or the cycle is the same. Anyhow, another BP for me!

QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2004 at 3:58 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1671409273424
View User Forum
Scholar
759 posts
The crusader spawned 3 times during the hour that I worked the hunter/forager cycle tonight. All 3 times he dropped the bp.
▲ Page top
best class for the use of this
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2004 at 4:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362714715
12 posts
I am a lvl 43 Iksar Shaman.. i have had my chestplate since i was lvl 29. i must say that this item is the best for iksar. when combined stacked with another Regen(of any level) this can add to a HUGE amount of mana regen. with a mind buff, cann, and regen, (i have the help of a horse too :), you can keep canning and casting to your hearts desire.. you must be warned though.. i wouldnt cann below 60% hp. you will get agro if you are meleeing. just felt i had to say all that. :)
▲ Page top
Level
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2003 at 7:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787114071
7 posts
Do you have to be a cetain level to use the effect on this CB?
▲ Page top
RE: Level
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2003 at 8:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758900088
Scholar
63 posts
Nope, regen is good from lvl one, from my understanding...if you think about it, its of greater value to kiters and non MT type midlevels.

After level 25 or so, the increased damage because of the relatively low AC (30 ac bp's available for the same or lesser price) really begins to outstrip the value of the regen for folks taking melee damage.

A note about the hunter/forager cycle. Did it the other day, for Seb key (had done it maybe a year earlier on another toon) and all I am getting is foragers, and finally they dry up. No hunters at all, a druid, lower level than me comes up and tells me I have to kill Doom (low to mid 50's casting and possibly summoning skelly) for the hunters to start spawning.

I figure he is setting us up for slaughter. My previous experious was popping into Trak, killing both hunter and forager (to get Seb key) who were both up withing 10 minutes of each other, and bingo.

Anyway, after 20 minutes of nothing, decided to risk it and pulled Doom to the EJ zone. Level 49 ranger, 51 cleric, 52 Shammy took him down easily. (clerics being particularly hard on undead--shammy slows a big help, ranger held aggro).

Low and behold, 2 minutes later hunters are popping one after another a ways to the right of EJ zone, down the zone wall. 7 or 8 minutes later we have are second set of medallions for the Seb key.
▲ Page top
RE: Level
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2003 at 4:39 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592259110921
7 posts
hmmmm, wear better, higher ac breastplate with stats, then between rounds plug this baby in!!?? no matter the stats, 5hp more per tick is 5 hp more per tick. it's really not that difficult to figure a use for this thing regardless of level!!??
▲ Page top
RE: Level
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2003 at 7:13 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1652660341379

My thoughts extactly tvarney ... I am about to go after buying or camping for one for my level 42 Warrior so he can help save mana for the Droods, Clerics, etc. that have to heal his punch-taking ***** hehehe
▲ Page top
Great Item
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2003 at 11:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247625205
View User Forum
26 posts
Find this to be a great item to assist in recouping HP during and between fights. But it is starting ti lose its usefullness fighting mobs above lvl 30. Down time is starting to grow again. If you dont mind the down time when no heals are avil. then this is the way to go right up to about lvl 35 - 40.
▲ Page top
Don't get lost in Trak's Teeth
QuoteReply
# Jun 10 2003 at 6:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256104671
9 posts
Just a word to the wise. If you plan on hunting the Crusader, don't get turned around and end up in the froglok camps. Went in looking for crusader with a 43 shammy a 43 ranger and myself a 38 druid all uber buffed and well equiped. We got a little lost looking for the crusader and ended up getting mobbed by like 10 frogs near the spectral camp. So be careful.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 18 2003 at 10:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I got one of these today on the torvonnilous server........... /join trade <enter> /1 WTS Ceremonial Iksar Chestplate PST!... Sold for 6k in no time.. =)
Nice CP
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2003 at 4:41 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591768191932
View User Forum
Sage
118 posts
Just picked one up yesterday mainly for the Regeneration effect. I use my Ry'Gorr Battle Mail to fight in and just throw this on when I sit down to med and whoopie... my health moves as fast as my mana now. I tried fighting in it but seemed to get beat up a little more then with my Ry'Gorr Battle Mail so I just keep this in my 85% or 100% WR containers until I need it, with all the other spare stuff I like to hall around with me! With my 9/19 Lamination and my 12/24 Crystalline Short Sword pumped up with about 22%(if there listing is correct)haste from my Silver Chitin Hand Wraps I just don't want to loose my +10 strength and of course the +20 mana of the Ry'Gorr Battle Mail. Still love this Regeneration!!!

Tadwenai
Half Elf, Ranger of the 32nd Season


A few changes and with my new Matchless Dragonhide breast plate, Runed Bolster Belt (Haste 31%), Swiftblade of Zek and Guard Captains Mallet. I use this Brest Plate and my Belt of the Great Turtle durring breaks and get my HP's back up. Some times I will leave this Breast plate on and can maintain HP above 80% and fight one Tesch Mas Gnoll after another without stopping, except when my Mana gets low then I through on the Belt of the Great Turtle and get the HP's back up to 100% quickly.


Edited, Sun Jun 1 22:34:01 2003

QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2003 at 10:59 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592254852622
44 posts
SCHWs are 21 to 22 percent haste, definitely not 32 though.
▲ Page top
RE: Nice CP
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2003 at 4:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768191932
View User Forum
Sage
118 posts
I often wonder about the "Haste" items! Oh yeah, I just read the listings under the "Haste" effect. So each item has it's own haste % set but not listed. The listing simply give you the range "Increase Attack Speed by 2% (L1) to 50% (L49)" for the spell data. Got it! But I must say I LOVE the HASTE effect what ever the % trully is!

Thanks, Tad




Edited, Mon Apr 21 04:50:52 2003

▲ Page top
Great for shamans...
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2003 at 10:53 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591776410526
Sage
280 posts
This is great for shamans because since we can cannibalize our hp into mana, this is like having a Flowing Thought 3 item equipped. The AC isn't bad either, getting a BP with more than 25 AC is going to cost alot more than this, and personally I like the extra hps/mana over some AC. Alot of shamans overllok this item but I bet it would sell for 3 times as much money if it did have FT3 as the effect. Other classes would like it more but its the same difference for a shaman.

59 Ogre Luminary on Luclin server--Chaotic Winds--Venerable Aggrok


Edited, Thu Mar 27 10:21:49 2003
▲ Page top
iksar regen
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2003 at 11:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251752768
View User Forum
5 posts
just got this today for my Warrior on lanys,
its great I play on GMT time, so on my days off from work, i normally have to solo from lack of ppl online, and this has turned regen'ing my hp's from 30mins to 5-10mins, I would only keep this or solo'ing tho, I swap to my better BP once in a stable group.

Lachine~

i want one

▲ Page top
Weird item
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2003 at 11:09 AM Rating: Default
animekenji
1,123 posts
Does anyone else find it strange that this item is called a chestplate yet can be worn by leather classes and looks like chainmail when worn? It's gonna take me a while, but my little level 18 ranger is going to start saving for this starting tonight. He has Ry'Gorr in his chest slot now, but I think the regen is worth more to me than the stats on the battle mail especially with my pathetic healing ability. If not, I can always carry the breastplate to wear during downtime and wear the Ry'Gorr when fighting.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
RE: Weird item
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2003 at 10:10 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758041483
34 posts
This item is not wearable by leather classes. Only plate and chain classes can equip this item.
